zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.Corby, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可比

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Latimer於1275年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby34歲，母親Alice Ledet27歲。他和Joanna de Govis至少有4個兒子。他去世於1317年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Latimer于1275年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby34岁，母亲Alice Ledet27岁。他和Joanna de Govis至少有4个儿子。他去世于1317年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Latimer was born in 1275, in Dorset, England, his father, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, was 34 and his mother, Alice Ledet, was 27. He had at least 4 sons with Joanna de Govis. He died in 1317, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Latimer est né en 1275, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Ledet, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Joanna de Govis. Il est décédé en 1317, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Latimer 1275 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby 34 und seine Mutter Alice Ledet 27. Er hatte mit Joanna de Govis mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1317 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Latimer è nato il nel 1275 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Ledet, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Joanna de Govis. Morì nel 1317, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Latimerが1275年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corbyは34歳，母Alice Ledetは27歳であった。彼はJoanna de Govisとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1317年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Latimer(이)가 1275년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ledet(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Joanna de Govis(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1317년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Latimer nasceu em 1275, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ledet, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Joanna de Govis. Ele faleceu em 1317, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Latimer родился в 1275 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Ledet, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Joanna de Govis. Он умер в 1317 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Latimer nació en 1275, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Ledet, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Joanna de Govis. Murió en 1317, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
